analysis: The project is a static website about black holes with existing CSS, HTML, and JS files. The theme should focus on black holes with animated objects, slides, and pages. The current files need to be enhanced with cosmic, dark-themed visuals, animations, and interactive elements related to black holes.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with cosmic-themed animations, black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements to create a dark, immersive black hole theme.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including mobile menu toggle functionality with smooth transitions and user-friendly interactions.
Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes.
Add event listeners and functionality for new buttons and interactive elements to ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and functionality.
